title: ADR 0033 — Workflow State Machine: Progress Ledger + Fail-Closed Evidence Guard
summary: Adds an optional per-sub progress ledger and a fail-closed evidence guard to harnessed's workflow state machine for precise crash recovery and blocking fake verification.
notes: MANIFEST_TYPE=ADR authoritative. Status is 'Proposed' (not 'Accepted'), so locked=false despite ADR type.
